title: rubus × realmontensis
intro: Rubus × realmontensis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a rare and exotic plant species that is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × realmontensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation and fever, and exhibit antiviral properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used to treat a range of health conditions, from digestive issues to skin problems.
